reason: UI forbidden patterns — primary checklist for code review of dashboard / audit / admin (chart-only without text summary, missing unauthorized vs empty distinction, sensitive fields rendered as plain strings, color-only signaling).
Verify each dashboard card has text summary + chart, audit log sensitive cells use <MaskedCell />, admin two-step confirmation dialog with diff summary, kill switch CONFIRM-text gate.

Verify URL state correctness for dashboard asset-group filter and audit multi-dim filter; admin write state confined to dialog scope; no copying audit/admin records to global; 60s polling pauses on visibilitychange='hidden'.
Verify no-any rule, runtime zod parse at MSW boundary for 3 new frontend-only contracts (dashboard-summary / audit-log / admin-config); branded IDs preserved.
3 new frontend-only contracts must be flagged as 'pending backend parity' for integration phase; field names and enums must follow platform PRD §11 / §12 vocabulary verbatim to minimize drift.
Confirm <StatusBadge>/<UnauthorizedState>/<EmptyState>/<ErrorState>/<ConfirmationDialog>/<MaskedCell /> reused, not duplicated; permission-point literals not scattered across components.
D1–D7 locked decisions + R1–R4 requirements + Acceptance Criteria used as the source of truth for trellis-check verdicts.
Platform PRD §11 dashboard 7-metric coverage and §12 audit redaction rules cross-checked against implementation.
Backend permissionPoints + domainErrorCodes diffed against frontend constants to ensure parity (audit_log:view, llm_provider:manage, tool_config:manage, log_source:manage, kill_switch:operate).
Backend logSourceConfigSchema diffed against /admin/log-sources form contract; field names + validation rules must be identical.
Backend mailGatewayConfigSchema diffed against /admin/mail-sources form contract.
